title: Fumi-sitmc
description: A messenger dedicated to transmitting messages across different messaging platforms o(￣▽￣)ブ
body:
Fumi 是一个基于 [NATS服务器](https://github.com/nats-io) 的消息转发工具，旨在为不同消息平台之间构建一条转发通道。

我们假定消息分布在多个平台，并且存在多个来源，通过内置的 API、协议库、机器人进行相互的消息转发。

所有消息会按照统一的格式发送到 NATS 中心服务器上，再分别由各个客户端进行解析。

Fumi is a message forwarding tool based on the  [NATS Server](https://github.com/nats-io) , designed to establish a forwarding channel between different messaging platforms.

We assume that messages are distributed across multiple platforms and originate from various sources, enabling mutual message forwarding through built-in APIs, protocol libraries, and bots.

All messages are sent to the central NATS server in a unified format and then parsed by respective clients.
